name: pregnancy-week-tracker
title: Pregnancy Week Tracker
description: Gestational-age progress with trimester boundaries, a 37–42w term band, and the EDD.

props.name: gestationalAgeDays
props.description: Direct gestational age in days; highest precedence.

props.name: eddDate
props.description: Estimated due date; preferred over LMP (often scan-adjusted).

props.name: asOf
props.description: Reference "today"; defaults to now. Set for deterministic rendering.

props.name: milestones
props.description: { week, label }[] ticks, e.g. anomaly scan.

clinicalNotes: Dating method matters: an EDD from a dating scan and one from LMP can differ by more than a week, so precedence is explicit gestationalAgeDays → eddDate (often scan-adjusted) → lmpDate, and the component always displays which basis the shown EDD came from. The term window (37–42w) is drawn as a band, not a single date, because "term" is a range and framing one day as the finish line is clinically misleading; the EDD (40w) is a marker within it. Gestational age is shown as weeks + days ("28w 3d"), the clinical convention. Presentation only — no risk assessment. Pass `asOf` for deterministic (SSR-safe) rendering.
notes: medcn-original. Composes progress (fill) + tooltip (tick labels); term window is a band, EDD a marker within it.
